# R-type tests (opcode 0110011). Expect Instruction Type: R

# add  x5, x4, x3
00000000001100100000001010110011
# sub  x5, x4, x3
01000000001100100000001010110011
# and  x5, x4, x3
00000000001100100111001010110011
# or   x5, x4, x3
00000000001100100110001010110011
# xor  x5, x4, x3
00000000001100100100001010110011
# sll  x5, x4, x3
00000000001100100001001010110011
# srl  x5, x4, x3
00000000001100100101001010110011
# sra  x5, x4, x3
01000000001100100101001010110011
# slt  x5, x4, x3
00000000001100100010001010110011
# sltu x5, x4, x3
00000000001100100011001010110011


# I-type OP-IMM tests (opcode 0010011). Expect Instruction Type: I
# These use Rs1=x12, Rd=x13, imm=10 for the non-shift cases.

# addi x13, x12, 10
00000000101001100000011010010011
# slti x13, x12, 10
00000000101001100010011010010011
# sltiu x13, x12, 10
00000000101001100011011010010011
# xori x13, x12, 10
00000000101001100100011010010011
# ori  x13, x12, 10
00000000101001100110011010010011
# andi x13, x12, 10
00000000101001100111011010010011

# Shift-immediate I-type (also opcode 0010011)
# slli x1, x2, 3
00000000001100010001000010010011
# srli x1, x2, 4
00000000010000010101000010010011
# srai x1, x2, 4
01000000010000010101000010010011


# I-type LOAD tests (opcode 0000011). Expect Instruction Type: I
# These use Rs1=x8, Rd=x9, imm=-16 (so hex shown should be 0xFF0)

# lb x9, -16(x8)
11111111000001000000010010000011
# lh x9, -16(x8)
11111111000001000001010010000011
# lw x9, -16(x8)
11111111000001000010010010000011


# I-type JALR test (opcode 1100111). Expect Instruction Type: I
# jalr x0, x1, 0 (this is "ret" in assembly)
00000000000000001000000001100111


# S-type STORE tests (opcode 0100011). Expect Instruction Type: S
# These use Rs1=x4, Rs2=x3, imm=-16 (hex should be 0xFF0)

# sb x3, -16(x4)
11111110001100100000100000100011
# sh x3, -16(x4)
11111110001100100001100000100011
# sw x3, -16(x4)
11111110001100100010100000100011


# SB-type BRANCH tests (opcode 1100011). Expect Instruction Type: SB
# These use Rs1=x5, Rs2=x30, imm=6

# beq x5, x30, 6
00000001111000101000001101100011
# bne x5, x30, 6
00000001111000101001001101100011
# blt x5, x30, 6
00000001111000101100001101100011
# bge x5, x30, 6
00000001111000101101001101100011

# SB negative immediate test (imm = -4)
# beq x5, x30, -4
11111111111000101000111011100011


# UJ-type JAL tests (opcode 1101111). Expect Instruction Type: UJ
# jal x1, 10
00000000101000000000000011101111

# UJ negative immediate test (imm = -8)
# jal x1, -8
11111111100111111111000011101111
